ingest_items.text: Quick bit of context about me before we start: I moved to Lisbon last year and I work as a marine biologist studying octopus cognition.
Thanks for the context. Lisbon is a wonderful base, and octopus cognition is a fascinating field. I will keep your background in mind.

question: Which city do I live in?

ingest_items.text: Quick bit of context about me before we start: I moved to Lisbon last year and I work as a marine biologist studying octopus cognition.
Thanks for the context, that is really helpful. I will remember that you are a marine biologist whose research focuses on studying octopus cognition, and I will keep that in mind going forward.
Important standing preference for any food suggestions you ever give me: I am strictly vegetarian and I am allergic to peanuts.
Understood. I will only suggest vegetarian options and will always avoid peanuts in anything I recommend.

question: Do I have any dietary restrictions?
